creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
indulging in an exquisite get away @raffles.galaxymacau with unparalleled service blends modern luxury & elegance ✨🏩🛁🍰🥂✨

📍Raffles panoramic two bedroom suite stands out as a sanctuary of comfort opulence featuring breathtaking views of the shimmering skyline and the enchanting waters & VIP butler services 🛁

📍 Raffles lounge & terrace adorned an inviting ambiance featuring Raffles Signature afternoon tea experience finely crafted pastries, delicate sandwiches 🍰

📍Raffles Long Bar is is more than just a bar; or their famed Macau Sling, it’s a gathering place where stories are shared, laughter echoes & memories are made 🍹

#RafflesAtGalaxyMacau #LongBarMacau
#LongBar #GalaxyMacau #rafflesloungeandterrace @galaxymacau 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#dotzsoh

transcription.text: Baby, spit it, baby, spit it in my eyes I wanna taste, I wanna taste the kiss inside I don't need no mama, I'm beautiful only Oh, oh, oh Ooh, let that go I don't wanna know what went wrong with you, girl Love me, love me, love me one more time, baby Oh, this taste, let it burst, it's over Baby, baby, baby Ooh, let that, that, that go
